headline: Ford Appoints Maria Ricciardone Chief Investor Relations Officer
summary: DEARBORN, Mich., April 30, 2026--Ford Motor Company today announced Maria Ricciardone has been appointed chief investor relations officer, effective May 1. Ricciardone joins Ford from Lockheed Martin, where she served as vice president, treasurer and investor relations. She succeeds Lynn Antipas Tyson, who will transition to a senior advisory role, reporting to chief financial officer Sherry House.

raw.headline: Ford Appoints Maria Ricciardone Chief Investor Relations Officer
raw.summary: DEARBORN, Mich., April 30, 2026--Ford Motor Company today announced Maria Ricciardone has been appointed chief investor relations officer, effective May 1.
